Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Defendant Azizeh Bajjaliya Motion To Compel Compliance For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Craig Pinedo, Esq. 415-693-9155 of Pinedo Law for Plaintiff.
Andrea Murphy, Esq. 415-278-9400 of Phillips Spallas & Angstad for Defendant Azizeh Bajjaliya.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Azizeh Bajjaliya's Motion To Compel Compliance For Production Of Documents, Set Two.

The motion to Compel is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff to file an amended response to document request removing "if any" from each of the categories set forth and provide additional documents "if any". Objections are preserved. Defendant to prepare order and must submit it directly to Judge Pro Tem Stein at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
